hotels.name: Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites
hotels.description_fr:
Le Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites est situé à seulement 1 km de l’entrée sud du parc national du Grand Canyon.

Toutes les chambres du Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites comprennent un petit-déjeuner gratuit et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Les chambres sont simplement meublées et disposent d’une télévision par câble à écran plat, de la climatisation et d’un plateau/bouilloire.

Pour votre plaisir, le Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites met à votre disposition une piscine intérieure et un bain à remous. 

L’aéroport international de Phoenix Sky Harbor se trouve à environ 224 miles (360 km), tandis que l’aéroport de Flagstaff Pulliam est à environ 80 miles (129 km).

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,3 pour un séjour à deux.

Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites is located only 1 miles from the south entrance to Grand Canyon National Park.

Stays in all guest rooms at Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites include a complimentary breakfast and free Wi-Fi. Rooms are simply furnished to include a flat-screen TV with cable, air-conditioning and in-room coffee-making facilities.

Grand Canyon Hotel & Suites features an indoor swimming pool and hot tub for enjoyment by our guests. 

Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport is approximately 224 miles (approx. 360 km) while Flagstaff Pulliam Airport is approximately 80 miles (129 km).

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.3 for a two-person trip.

hotels.name: Canyon Plaza Premier Studios and Apts-South Rim
hotels.description_fr:
Ces appartements d'Arizona offrent une vue sur les vallées et la forêt. L'entrée de Grand Canyon South Rim est accessible en 5 minutes en voiture.

Les studios possèdent une kitchenette et les appartements comprennent une cuisine entièrement équipée. Tous les logements disposent d'un balcon.

Le restaurant JJK's du Studio and Apartments Canyon Plaza Premier est ouvert pour le petit-déjeuner, le déjeuner et le dîner.

L'établissement comporte une piscine extérieure et un bain à remous intérieur. Un concierge est à votre disposition pour vous informer sur les attractions de la région. De nombreuses visites du Grand Canyon sont organisées depuis l'établissement.

L'aéroport Grand Canyon National Park Airport se situe à seulement 3 km.
hotels.description_en:
Views of the valleys and forest areas are featured in select Arizona apartments. Grand Canyon South Rim Entrance is 5 minutes’ drive.

Studios feature a kitchenette and apartments offer a fully equipped kitchen at Canyon Plaza Premier Studios and Apts-South Rim.  A balcony is provided in each unit.

JJK’s Restaurant is open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner at the Studio and Apartments Canyon Plaza Premier.

An outdoor swimming pool and indoor hot tub are available for guest relaxation. A concierge is provided to assist guests with area attractions, and many Grand Canyon tours pick up from the hotel.

Grand Canyon National Park Airport is just 2 miles away from Canyon Plaza Premier Studios and Apts-South Rim.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.1 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
Este establecimiento de Arizona está a 5 minutos en coche de la entrada del borde sur del Gran Cañón. Algunos de los apartamentos gozan de vistas a los valles y a las zonas forestales.

El Canyon Plaza Premier Studios and Apts-South Rim dispone de estudios con zona de cocina y de apartamentos con cocina totalmente equipada. Todos los alojamientos tienen balcón.

El Studio and Apartments Canyon Plaza Premier alberga el restaurante JJK's, que abre para el desayuno, el almuerzo y la cena.

El establecimiento cuenta con piscina al aire libre y bañera de hidromasaje cubierta. El conserje le informará sobre los lugares de interés de la zona y los huéspedes podrán disfrutar de numerosas excursiones al Gran Cañón que salen desde el hotel.
hotels.description_pt:

O Canyon Plaza Premier Studios and Apts-South Rim disponibiliza estúdios com uma kitchenette e apartamentos com uma cozinha totalmente equipada. Todas as acomodações incluem uma varanda.

O Studio and Apartments Canyon Plaza Premier alberga o Restaurante JJK's que está aberto para o pequeno-almoço, almoço e jantar.

Uma piscina exterior e uma banheira de hidromassagem interior estão disponíveis para o relaxamento dos hóspedes. Um serviço de concierge está disponível para ajudar os hóspedes com as atracções da região. Várias excursões para o Grand Canyon partem do hotel.
hotels.description_it:
Situato in Arizona, a 5 minuti di auto dall'ingresso all'Orlo Sud del Grand Canyon, questo complesso offre appartamenti dotati in alcuni casi di vista sulle valli e sulla foresta.

Tutti gli alloggi del Canyon Plaza Premier Studios and Apts-South Rim presentano un balcone, mentre gli appartamenti sono provvisti di cucina completamente attrezzata e i monolocali vantano un angolo cottura.

Presso la struttura Studio and Apartments Canyon Plaza Premier troverete il ristorante JJK, aperto a colazione, pranzo e cena.

A vostra disposizione una piscina all'aperto e una vasca idromassaggio coperta, ideali per trascorrere piacevoli momenti di relax. Potrete inoltre approfittare del servizio concierge per ottenere utili informazioni sulle attrazioni turistiche locali.
